title.en: So many supreme path void demons died, but Ye T...

content.en:
So many supreme path void demons died, but Ye Tian didn't die.

It made these Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demons extremely annoyed, and they ended the attack halfway, which was too much of a loss.

And the most annoyed is His Highness The Hague, he came here to abuse the food, but he was abused.

"Increase troops, I'm going to destroy this third-level battlefield!"

His Highness The Hague said angrily.

At this time, a sixfold Dao Void Demon said: "Your Highness The Hague, now the battle situation on other battlefields is even more tragic, and after the Luohe Fortress is breached, it is still necessary to completely occupy that area, and it is currently fighting fiercely, and it is difficult to send more troops in a short period of time." We still need to wait for some years, and while the fighting situation on other battlefields is not fierce, we will mobilize a group of Supreme Dao Void Demons to come over. "

His Highness The Hague also knew that it would be difficult to send more Supreme Dao Void Demons in a short period of time, but in fact, he could really do whatever it takes, so he could naturally be beaten.

But it's not worth it!

The value of this third-level battlefield is not too high, and if the price is too high, it is not cost-effective to occupy it.

The value of other battlefields is very high, and the family will definitely take the lead in laying out other battlefields.

......

"This time, I killed a lot of Supreme Dao Void Demons and made a lot of money, but it's a pity that I didn't bring back those looted resources. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, he doesn't care.

After killing so many Supreme Dao Void Demons, coupled with the Heaven and Earth Origin Gifts he usually accumulated, if they were used together, there should be hope that his cultivation would be raised to the peak realm of the Second Dao Realm.

When the time comes, he will be able to impact the Triple Dao Realm.

Once he breaks through to the Triple Dao Realm, he will be nearly invincible on this battlefield.

However, in order to be on the safe side, he was going to kill some more Supreme Dao Void Demons and absorb those Heaven and Earth Origin Gifts at one time.

Infinite Domain.

Infinite Heavenly Palace.

this day.

A Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm Heavenly Venerable stood in a row, waiting for the Infinite Heavenly Emperor of the Infinite Heavenly Palace to come.

Rumble!!!!

The barrier of the Infinite Domain was torn apart, and a figure descended.

"I've seen Lord Wuji Heavenly Emperor!"

"I've seen Lord Wuji Heavenly Emperor!"

"I've seen Lord Wuji Heavenly Emperor!"

The Infinite Heavenly Emperor was wearing a set of silver armor, his long silver hair was fluttering, his eyes were pure white silver, releasing a silver light, and this light contained a terrifying sixth sequence of supreme rules.

At this time, none of these Sevenfold Dao Realm Heavenly Venerables dared to look directly at the Infinite Heavenly Emperor.

The Infinite Heavenly Emperor was too powerful, far from being comparable to the Sevenfold Dao Realm.

"Nothing has happened to the Infinite Domain these years, right?" asked the Infinite Heavenly Emperor.

At this time, the Hundred Battles Heavenly Venerable said, "Lord Wuji Heavenly Emperor, except for the fact that the True Dao Domain was classified as a third-level battlefield, there are no other major matters. "

"I've known about the True Dao Domain and the Luohe Fortress for a long time, and those old guys have reprimanded me a lot. However, since it has happened, forget it. The loss of a True Dao Domain would have no effect on our Infinite Heavenly Palace. Wuji Heavenly Emperor said lightly.

Seeing that the Wuji Heavenly Emperor said this, the Hundred Battles Heavenly Venerable breathed a sigh of relief.

Suddenly.

The Sixth Heavenly Venerable stepped forward and said, "Lord Wuji Heavenly Emperor, the Wuji Domain is suspected to have given birth to a Supreme Dao Realm that has taken the path of the strongest to the Dao, and has cultivated to reach the Double Supreme Dao Realm, and has also comprehended the rules of the Eighth Sequence of the Supreme Dao. "

"Oh, the Supreme Dao Realm that has taken the path of the strongest to the Dao, could it be that he has joined our Infinite Heavenly Palace?"

The Infinite Heavenly Emperor became interested.

If he was loyal to the Wuji Heavenly Palace, if there was no identity problem, he would be willing to accept him as an apprentice.

But the Sixth Cry Heavenly Venerable said: "Lord Wuji Heavenly Emperor, the Supreme Dao Realm who has taken the path of the strongest to the Dao is the enemy of our Wuji Heavenly Palace, and he has also joined the Taisu Palace and is currently on the battlefield of the True Dao Domain. "

"Taisu Palace!"

The Wuji Heavenly Emperor's face was a little unkind.

Liuqi Tianzun said again: "This son seems to have a lot of clones, and he comes from the Origin Realm, we guess that his body must still be in the Origin Realm, so it has been difficult to kill him." Such a demon must not let him grow up, and he must kill the other party before he grows up!"

Subsequently, the Sixth Cry Tianzun said Ye Tian's specific information.

When Wuji Tianzun heard this, he suddenly became solemn.

Although Ye Tian is still just an ant now, even if he keeps growing, he may not be able to threaten, but it does not mean that there is no hope, after all, the other party has improved his strength too quickly, and he is very demonic, more terrifying than some peerless demons of his supreme path.

Of course.

As long as he couldn't comprehend the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, he wouldn't be able to reach his level in his lifetime, and he wouldn't be too worried.

And if you want to comprehend the rules of the sixth sequence of the Dao, it is not only a matter of talent, but also many factors such as fate and luck, all of which are indispensable.

The demons who take the path of the strongest to the Tao are actually not very remarkable.

If he cultivates it, he can pay some price, but it is meaningless, and what he forcibly cultivates is just waste material, which cannot reach his level.

But he didn't want to have such an enemy, if he could kill it, he would naturally kill it.

"Ye Tian, I'll make a move!"

Wuji Heavenly Emperor said.

Seeing that the Wuji Heavenly Emperor was about to make a move, the Six Cry Heavenly Venerable thought that Ye Tian was dead.

"Give me that Ye Tian's breath and the picture of time and space. "

The Infinite Heavenly Emperor ordered.

"Yes!"

The Six Cry Tianzun let Bai Ye come, showing Ye Tian's breath and the time and space picture.

The Wuji Heavenly Emperor looked at Ye Tian in the time-space screen, and took out the treasure of the Wuji Heavenly Emperor's palace-the Eight Patterns Supreme Dao Weapon Taiyi Roulette.

Rumble!!!!

The Taiyi Roulette Wheel was suspended in the void, locking Ye Tian's breath.

Immediately, the Wuji Heavenly Emperor urged his own power, allowing the Taiyi Roulette to cross the Origin of the Wuji Domain, the Three Battlefields, and the Origin Realm, and began to kill Ye Tian.

"Kill!"

Rumble!

A terrifying force spread across time and space.

"This son, it's dead!"

The Infinite Heavenly Emperor affirmed.

......

Infinite Domain.

Ye Tian's other replica body sensed a great crisis coming.

Click!

This replica body was directly annihilated.

And the other side.

The other replica body on the battlefield of the True Dao Domain also began to crack, and the seventh sequence of the Dao Rule Protector weakened most of the attack power, only causing the replica body to be severely damaged.

The land of eternity.

A terrifying force descended through the Origin Realm, and it also injured his replica body.

"Such a terrifying rule power, if I hadn't comprehended the rules of the seventh sequence of supreme paths, I'm afraid this blow just now would be enough to annihilate my entire body!"

Ye Tian's face changed drastically.

Although he said that he had the means of resurrection, the resurrection methods in the past were too low-level, and it was estimated that he could not be resurrected in the face of the power of the Supreme Dao Rules.

In other words, if he did not comprehend the rules of the seventh sequence of supreme paths, then he would definitely die.

This moment.

He realized that copying his body would not make him immortal, and if he really encountered a terrifying existence, a single thought could wipe out his entire body and make him completely fall and die.

"Who just shot?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

But when he thought about it, he guessed it.

To be able to have such a terrifying Dao rule power, and to be able to cross the third-level battlefield and the origin realm to attack, there is only one person in the Infinite Domain - the Infinite Heavenly Emperor.
